description_long: This is a large, modern office building with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The facade is dominated by tall, dark-tinted glass windows arranged in vertical strips, separated by light-colored structural columns. The rooftop features a central mechanical penthouse, several HVAC units, and visible utility conduits, all surrounded by a low parapet wall. The building's exterior is sleek and uniform, with no visible ornamentation or signage, emphasizing functionality and simplicity. The window pattern is highly regular, contributing to a sense of order and repetition typical of late 20th-century commercial architecture. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, steel, and glass, with a likely reinforced concrete core.
description: A tall, modern office building with a flat roof, dark glass windows in vertical strips, and a central rooftop mechanical structure. The facade is sleek, uniform, and functional, with no visible signage.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main facade with evenly spaced vertical glass windows and the rooftop mechanical penthouse offset to the left.
description_view_1: This side reveals more rooftop HVAC units and utility conduits, with the mechanical penthouse centered and additional rooftop details visible.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the regular window pattern and the mechanical penthouse positioned centrally, with fewer rooftop units visible.
description_view_3: This side displays the mechanical penthouse further back, with two large rooftop HVAC units and visible antennae.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular vertical strips of tall, rectangular windows separated by narrow structural columns, repeated uniformly across all facades.
